core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Swiss typography with SaaS functional density.
Emotion First: The dashboard should feel 'Efficient' and 'In Control'.
Content is King: Event banners and data take precedence over UI chrome.
Negative Space: Use generous padding (p-6, p-8) inside containers.
Contrast: High contrast for text, subtle contrast for structural borders.

typography.import_instruction: Add this to index.html or import in CSS: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Barlow+Condensed:wght@400;600;700&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&family=JetBrains+Mono&display=swap');

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-all duration-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md active:scale-95 font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-all duration-200 font-medium
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-all duration-200 font-medium
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-all duration-200 font-medium

cards.base: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts. Use grid-based asymmetry.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects (backdrop-blur-md) for sticky headers.
Interactive elements must have clear hover and focus states.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.

hero_banners.description: Crowd at a concert with confetti

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'qrcode.react' for generating QR codes on the frontend.
Follow the 'Bento' grid layout for the dashboard.
Implement the 'Tracing Beam' effect on active event cards if possible, or a subtle glow border.
Ensure all forms use 'react-hook-form' with 'zod' validation.
